title: Aneotic's Cobblemon Fantaisy - Fabric Edition
description: A Cobblemon and Hephaestus focused modpack. Perfect for exploration and encounters.
body:
Welcome to Aneotic's Cobblemon Fantasy,

a light modpack using Cobblemon as the main focus. More food recipes for the sedentary players offered by Farmer's delight. More inventory management through the Traveller's Backpack and many other tweaks will allow for a smooth and relaxed gameplay. Farm with your Cobblemon or explore the wild while defending yourself from your convential mob, you'll find everything in-between in Aneotic's Cobblemon Fantasy.


Current modpack focus:
- Cobblemon

- Farmer's Delight

- Traveller's Backpack

- And more! (List of mods should be available in the Relations tab under the Dependencies section.)

Disclaimer:

I did not intend this modpack to be for the broader masses, therefore I will not accept any suggestions and will only fix bugs at my own discression.

 

All the mods used in this modpack belongs to their respective creators. I do not own anything.

Logo by Me (Joelou1). Do not redistribute the logo.

**NOTE:** Make sure you backup your option.txt file if you update the modpack, otherwise your keybinds might be overwritten.
